content.text: Let's promote the Komatik release through the staging branch then to master.
Acknowledged. I'll cut release/staging-to-master-2026-05-17-1347 and open the PR.
Also delete the engine-station-types and engine-station-api Edge Functions from prod.
Deleting engine-station-types and engine-station-api now via supabase functions delete.
Check that KomatikAI org settings still gate the v3 pipeline correctly.
Verified: KomatikAI v3 gate is intact. The xbom_slots insert is where the failure is occurring.
Re-check the komatik PR list to see which release/staging-to-master-2026-05-17-1348 supersedes the earlier branch.
Spring matrix re-run will validate the xbom_slots fix once Slipsteam ships v2.
Noted; standing by to re-trigger the spring matrix cell.
